title: Sanji Is Trapped by the Wedding
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on Big Mom Pirates, Pedro, Big Mom as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You didn't have to come all the way...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who's the idiot who thinks it's a good idea...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to mess with the highlight of my day during the wedding?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmm? Now would you look at that ...that's one interesting creature I see up there! :o

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: in a courtyard within the Chateau.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright, we've got him cornered in the court- yard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Damn it... what are they planning ?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Despite being enemies, I've always respected you as a powerful opponent, Pedro...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Every time we would see each other,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The scars on our left eyes would both begin to itch!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was only a mere 5 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When you were still a man who was incredibly attached to the idea of staying alive!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So why must you repeat the same mistake twice?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's clear that you don't have much time left...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MAMA TOOK SO YEARS AWAY FROM YOUR REGULAR LIFESPAN- BON!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have no intention of returning to my home country alive!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 39 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
